metadata.name: fusion_stake_controller
metadata.description: fuSOL Native Stake Share Pool — the immutable Allocation Controller (see ../../docs/fusion-docs.md and docs/stake-pool)

instructions.name: close_preference
docs: Owner (or anyone once the position is gone): close a preference and refund rent to the
preference owner.

accounts.name: closer
docs: The position owner, or anyone when the underlying position no longer exists (or holds
zero ink).

accounts.name: fusion_position
docs: the handler decides the authorization rule from its live state.

accounts.name: rent_recipient
docs: close can never redirect the refund.

instructions.name: close_preference_window
docs: Anyone, after the deadline: freeze direction totals and enter PLAN-DIRECTED.

instructions.name: deposit_sol
docs: Permissionless: deposit SOL through the controller deposit authority; fuSOL mints
immediately at the pool rate. Backing is undirected until a preference is snapshotted.

accounts.name: depositor
docs: The lamports source (`[s,w]` in the CPI).

accounts.name: user_fusol_account
docs: Receives the minted fuSOL.

accounts.name: maintenance_vault
docs: The maintenance vault — the pool's manager fee account; ALSO passed as the referrer
slot (referral fee is 0, upstream only requires a valid pool-token account there).

accounts.name: deposit_authority
docs: authority; the trailing signer account of `DepositSol`).

instructions.name: deposit_stake
docs: Stake owner: deposit a fully active stake account delegated to a pool validator (the
account's staker+withdrawer must already be authorized to the deposit-authority PDA).

accounts.name: depositor
docs: The depositing user (event attribution + fee payer; the stake account's authorities
must already point at the deposit-authority PDA — see the module doc).

accounts.name: stake_pool
docs: the cap denominator (total pool lamports).

accounts.name: user_stake_account
docs: delegation to `vote_account`, authorities) is upstream's; only its lamports feed the
cap pre-check here.

accounts.name: vote_account
docs: mismatch between this and the stake's actual voter via the validator stake account).

accounts.name: validator_record
docs: The controller's record for that validator — must exist (register + admission first).

accounts.name: user_fusol_account
docs: Receives the minted fuSOL.

accounts.name: maintenance_vault
docs: The maintenance vault (manager fee account; also the referrer slot, fee 0).

accounts.name: stake_history
docs: deserialized, it is ~16 KiB).

instructions.name: execute_next_action
docs: Anyone: execute the one deterministic valid rebalance action within churn limits.

accounts.name: vote_account
docs: selection, never a caller choice.

accounts.name: transient_stake_account
docs: deactivated by remove; unused rider for add).

accounts.name: maintenance_vault
docs: The maintenance vault (crank reward source).

accounts.name: crank_reward_account
docs: The caller's fuSOL account for the crank reward.

instructions.name: finalize_plan
docs: Anyone: prove target conservation, record capacity shortfall, commit final targets.

accounts.name: validator_list
docs: list member).

accounts.name: maintenance_vault
docs: The maintenance vault (crank reward source).

accounts.name: crank_reward_account
docs: The caller's fuSOL account for the crank reward.

instructions.name: finalize_pool
docs: Anyone: finalize canonical pool totals, snapshot NAV/supply, open the preference
window.

accounts.name: stake_pool
docs: dangling preferred validator.

accounts.name: fusol_mint
docs: The pool mint (epoch fee is minted).

accounts.name: maintenance_vault
docs: The maintenance vault — receives the epoch fee (as the manager fee account) AND funds
the crank reward.

accounts.name: crank_reward_account
docs: The caller's fuSOL account for the crank reward.

instructions.name: finish_epoch
docs: Anyone: REBALANCE → IDLE once targets are exhausted or the churn budget is reached.

accounts.name: maintenance_vault
docs: The maintenance vault (crank reward source).

accounts.name: crank_reward_account
docs: The caller's fuSOL account for the crank reward.

instructions.name: initialize_controller
docs: One-time genesis: create `ControllerConfig` + `EpochState` and record the predeclared
immutable address set. No authority is stored (the payer only funds rent).

accounts.name: program_data
docs: This program's `ProgramData` account (BPF upgradeable loader), derived as the canonical
programdata PDA so it cannot be spoofed. Gates genesis to the program's UPGRADE
authority — front-run protection only; nothing about the payer is recorded.

accounts.name: pool_authority
docs: so its canonical bump is derived and recorded; it holds no data and never will.

instructions.name: initialize_pool
docs: One-time: CPI the stake-pool `Initialize` with the controller PDAs and the fixed fee
set, then seal the controller (`sealed = true`, forever).

accounts.name: payer
docs: Transaction fee payer only; nothing is recorded about it.

accounts.name: stake_pool
docs: recorded address and to the FORK program as owner; the CPI initializes it.

accounts.name: pool_authority
docs: `Initialize` CPI via `invoke_signed`.

accounts.name: pool_withdraw_authority
docs: stake-pool program re-derives and enforces it in the CPI).

accounts.name: validator_list
docs: size must yield exactly `MAX_VALIDATORS` (the CPI enforces this).

accounts.name: reserve_stake
docs: pool withdraw authority; the CPI validates its state).

accounts.name: fusol_mint
docs: The fuSOL mint. `Account<Mint>` under `anchor_spl::token` enforces LEGACY SPL ownership
(never Token-2022); decimals / freeze / authority / supply checks live in the handler.

accounts.name: maintenance_vault
docs: The maintenance vault — validated below as a fuSOL account owned by the maintenance
PDA, then installed as the pool's manager fee account.

accounts.name: stake_pool_program
docs: would receive the pool-authority PDA's signature).

instructions.name: plan_directed_batch
docs: Anyone: refresh eligibility + directed targets/caps/capacity for the next validator
slice.

accounts.name: validator_list
docs: All target math runs over the FINALIZED snapshot in `EpochState`, never a live total
(deposits mid-epoch move the live pool total; the plan must not chase it).

accounts.name: maintenance_vault
docs: The maintenance vault (crank reward source).

accounts.name: crank_reward_account
docs: The caller's fuSOL account for the crank reward.

instructions.name: plan_neutral_batch
docs: Anyone: fold one bounded slice of the current deterministic neutral capacity round.

accounts.name: maintenance_vault
docs: The maintenance vault (crank reward source).

accounts.name: crank_reward_account
docs: The caller's fuSOL account for the crank reward.

instructions.name: reconcile_batch
docs: Anyone: reconcile the next bounded validator-list slice (merge completed transients).

accounts.name: epoch_state
docs: The single crank write lane (cursor + phase).

accounts.name: maintenance_vault
docs: The maintenance vault (crank reward source).

accounts.name: crank_reward_account
docs: The caller's fuSOL account for the crank reward.

instructions.name: register_validator
docs: Permissionless: create a `ValidatorRecord` for a vote account (registration, not
admission).

accounts.name: vote_account
docs: `fusion_stake_view::vote_state` (fails closed on unsupported versions).

instructions.name: set_preference
docs: Position owner: select or change the validator direction for one fuSOL position
(effective next epoch; at most one change per epoch).

accounts.name: owner
docs: The Fusion position owner (verified against the parsed `Position.owner` in the
handler); pays rent on first use.

accounts.name: fusion_position
docs: byte-parsed (`fusion_stake_view::position`) in the handler; NEVER written (Fusion debt
paths stay fully independent of this program).

accounts.name: vote_account
docs: registration exists for it).

accounts.name: preference
docs: Created on first set, reused on change (`init_if_needed` — the once-per-epoch change
counter must survive re-targeting; close_preference additionally rejects a live-ink close in the change epoch, so close+recreate cannot reset the limit).

instructions.name: snapshot_preference
docs: Anyone, during the preference window: count one valid position into its selected
validator's epoch directed weight (once per epoch).

accounts.name: epoch_state
docs: Read-only: phase + window-deadline checks (snapshots never advance the crank machine,
keeping them parallel across validators).

accounts.name: fusion_position
docs: byte-parsed in the handler; never written.

accounts.name: validator_record
docs: The record of the preference's SELECTED validator (seeded by the stored vote account,
so a snapshot can never credit a different validator).

instructions.name: start_epoch
docs: Anyone: IDLE → RECONCILE when the cluster epoch advances past the controller epoch.

instructions.name: sync_preference
docs: Anyone: refresh a preference's observed ink/nonce after a collateral change
(eligibility delayed to next epoch).

accounts.name: fusion_position
docs: byte-parsed in the handler; never written.

errors.name: AlreadySealed
errors.msg: Controller is already sealed: initialize_pool may run exactly once

errors.name: InvalidConfigAddress
errors.msg: A predeclared address passed to initialize_controller is the default pubkey

errors.name: AddressMismatch
errors.msg: Supplied account does not match the ControllerConfig-recorded address

errors.name: InvalidFusolMint
errors.msg: fuSOL mint must be legacy SPL, 9 decimals, freeze authority None, zero supply, mint authority = the stake-pool withdraw-authority PDA

errors.name: InvalidMaintenanceVault
errors.msg: Maintenance vault must be a fuSOL token account whose authority is the maintenance PDA

errors.name: InvalidVoteAccount
errors.msg: Vote account is not owned by the Vote program or does not parse under a supported VoteState version

errors.name: ZeroAmount
errors.msg: Amount must be non-zero

errors.name: MathOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: PoolNotInitialized
errors.msg: Pool is not initialized yet: initialize_pool must seal the controller before deposits

errors.name: ValidatorNotInPool
errors.msg: Validator is not admitted to the stake-pool validator list (or is draining) — deposit SOL or choose another validator

errors.name: ValidatorCapExceeded
errors.msg: Stake deposit would push the validator past its lifecycle cap — deposit SOL or choose another eligible validator

errors.name: CorruptValidatorStatus
errors.msg: Validator record's lifecycle status byte is corrupt (fail closed)

errors.name: InvalidStakePoolAccount
errors.msg: Stake-pool account failed to parse (wrong account or truncated data)

errors.name: InvalidValidatorListEntry
errors.msg: Validator-list entry missing or inconsistent with the validator record

errors.name: NotYetImplemented
errors.msg: Instruction not yet implemented

errors.name: WrongPhase
errors.msg: Crank instruction called in the wrong phase

errors.name: EpochNotAdvanced
errors.msg: Cluster epoch has not advanced past the controller epoch

errors.name: InvalidRemainingAccounts
errors.msg: remaining_accounts malformed: wrong count, order, duplicate, or account for the cursor slice

errors.name: StaleValidatorRecord
errors.msg: Validator record was not covered by this epoch's reconcile pass (stale observations)

errors.name: RecordAlreadyPlanned
errors.msg: Validator record already received a current-epoch plan result

errors.name: PreferenceWindowClosed
errors.msg: The preference window is not open at the current slot

errors.name: PreferenceWindowStillOpen
errors.msg: The preference window deadline has not passed yet

errors.name: PreferenceNotCountable
errors.msg: Preference is not countable this epoch (mint/owner/nonce/delay/already-counted)

errors.name: PreferenceChangeLimit
errors.msg: Preference already changed this epoch (at most one change per epoch)

errors.name: PreferenceOwnerMismatch
errors.msg: Signer is not the position owner recorded on the live Position

errors.name: InvalidPositionAccount
errors.msg: Fusion position account failed the fusd-core owner check or does not parse as a Position

errors.name: ValidatorNotEligibleForPreference
errors.msg: Preference targets a Draining/Removable validator — choose an eligible validator

errors.name: DirectedSharesExceedSupply
errors.msg: Plan rejected: total eligible directed shares exceed the finalized fuSOL supply

errors.name: PlanConservationViolated
errors.msg: Plan conservation violated: directed + neutral + shortfall != productive lamports

errors.name: NeutralRoundInconsistent
errors.msg: Neutral capacity round incomplete or inconsistent with the unsaturated count

errors.name: RebalanceComplete
errors.msg: Rebalance walk already complete — call finish_epoch

errors.name: WrongActionTarget
errors.msg: Passed validator is not the deterministic selection for the current rebalance slot

errors.name: EpochNotFinished
errors.msg: Rebalance walk incomplete and churn budget not exhausted — the epoch is not finished

errors.name: PositionStillOpen
errors.msg: Position still exists: only the preference owner may close this preference

errors.name: InvalidRentRecipient
errors.msg: Rent recipient must be the recorded preference owner

errors.name: InvalidRewardRecipient
errors.msg: Crank reward recipient must not be the maintenance vault itself

errors.name: PreferenceChangeLimit2
errors.msg: Preference already changed this epoch (close+recreate does not reset the limit)

types.name: ControllerConfig
docs: The controller's immutable address book. PDA `[b"controller"]`, created once by
`initialize_controller` (which only RECORDS predeclared addresses — the stake-pool-side
accounts need not exist yet) and frozen by `initialize_pool` (`sealed = true`).
No authority is stored anywhere in this account: the payer funds creation and keeps
nothing. Every recorded address is compared (`address =` constraints) on each later
instruction, so a mis-built transaction can never smuggle a foreign account into a CPI.

fields.name: version
docs: Layout version byte (1).

fields.name: sealed
docs: `false` between `initialize_controller` and `initialize_pool`; `true` forever after.
While unsealed, deposits are rejected and the one-time pool CPI is still available.

fields.name: stake_pool_program
docs: The pinned stake-pool FORK program (== `constants::FUSION_STAKE_POOL_PROGRAM_ID`;
recorded so the audit config manifest reads it from one on-chain account).

fields.name: stake_pool
docs: The `StakePool` state account (pre-created, program-owned, initialized by our CPI).

fields.name: validator_list
docs: The pool's `ValidatorList` account (pre-created at exactly `MAX_VALIDATORS` capacity).

fields.name: reserve_stake
docs: The pool's reserve stake account.

fields.name: fusol_mint
docs: The fuSOL mint (legacy SPL, 9 decimals, freeze authority None, mint authority = the
pool withdraw-authority PDA).

fields.name: pool_withdraw_authority
docs: The stake-pool program's withdraw-authority PDA
(`[stake_pool, b"withdraw"]` under the FORK program id) — derived and recorded at init.

fields.name: maintenance_vault
docs: The maintenance vault: a fuSOL token account, authority = the `[b"maintenance"]` PDA.
Doubles as the stake pool's manager fee account, so every pool fee lands here.

fields.name: fusd_core_program
docs: fusd-core — owner of the `Position` accounts the Preference layer reads.

fields.name: fusol_collateral_mint
docs: The collateral mint a Fusion `Position` must hold for its preference to count. Recorded
as its own named field (the Preference path never derives it); at genesis it MUST equal
`fusol_mint` — the fuSOL market's collateral mint IS the pool mint — and
`initialize_controller` enforces that equality.

fields.name: bump
docs: Canonical bump of this `[b"controller"]` PDA.

fields.name: pool_authority_bump
docs: Canonical bump of the `[b"pool_authority"]` PDA (manager + staker signer).

fields.name: deposit_authority_bump
docs: Canonical bump of the `[b"deposit_authority"]` PDA (SOL + stake deposit signer).

fields.name: maintenance_authority_bump
docs: Canonical bump of the `[b"maintenance"]` PDA (maintenance vault token authority).

fields.name: _reserved
docs: Forward-compat reserve. Carve from the HEAD; zeroed bytes on old accounts must decode
as the new field's `0 = disabled/none` sentinel (fusd-core discipline).

types.name: ControllerInitialized
docs: One-time: `initialize_controller` recorded the immutable address set.

types.name: EpochPhaseChanged
docs: The crank state machine moved phases (`EpochState::PHASE_*` bytes).

types.name: EpochState
docs: The single crank write lane (zero-copy). PDA `[b"epoch_state"]`.
Competing permissionless callers may race, but only one transaction can advance a given
cursor value; successful transitions are idempotent at the task level. Fusion position
operations never write this account, so debt paths stay independent of the crank.
All plan aggregates are FINALIZED-snapshot values: the controller never estimates stake
balances — it snapshots the canonical stake-pool totals at FINALIZE and plans from those.

fields.name: controller_epoch
docs: The epoch this controller cycle is processing (advanced by `start_epoch` when the
cluster epoch exceeds it).

fields.name: reconcile_cursor
docs: Next validator-list index RECONCILE will update (u64 for field alignment; the upstream
list index is u32).

fields.name: plan_directed_cursor
docs: Next canonical validator ordinal PLAN-DIRECTED will process.

fields.name: rebalance_actions_done
docs: Rebalance actions executed this epoch.

fields.name: preference_window_close_slot
docs: Slot at which the preference window closes (set by FINALIZE; 0 = window not open).

fields.name: nav_total_lamports
docs: Canonical `StakePool.total_lamports` at FINALIZE.

fields.name: nav_fusol_supply
docs: Canonical fuSOL supply at FINALIZE.

fields.name: productive_lamports
docs: `total - reserve_target` — the lamports the plan MUST fully assign (or record as
capacity shortfall).

fields.name: reserve_target
docs: The epoch's operational reserve target.

fields.name: total_directed_shares
docs: Σ eligible directed shares over all validators, CHECKED-summed in PLAN-DIRECTED; the
plan is rejected when it exceeds `nav_fusol_supply` (`D > S`).

fields.name: neutral_total
docs: The neutral pool remaining to distribute (decremented as rounds grant).

fields.name: unsaturated_active_count
docs: Unsaturated Active validators entering the CURRENT capacity round.

fields.name: capacity_shortfall
docs: Neutral lamports no Active capacity could absorb (recorded at PLAN-FINALIZE; they stay
in reserve temporarily).

fields.name: churn_budget_total
docs: This epoch's global churn budget (`bps_of(total, GLOBAL_CHURN_CAP_BPS)`).

fields.name: churn_budget_used
docs: Budget consumed by executed actions (`<= churn_budget_total`).

fields.name: healthy_delegated_lamports
docs: Delegated pool lamports whose validator passed the health check this epoch.

fields.name: total_delegated_lamports
docs: Total DELEGATED pool lamports (excludes the reserve — the guard denominator).

fields.name: epoch_payout_budget_used
docs: Crank payouts made this epoch (`<= CRANK_EPOCH_PAYOUT_BUDGET`).

fields.name: neutral_round_number
docs: Completed capacity rounds this epoch (terminates within `MAX_NEUTRAL_ROUNDS`).
`0` doubles as "no round opened yet this phase".

fields.name: neutral_cursor
docs: In-round validator cursor: next canonical validator ordinal to fold into the round.

fields.name: sum_directed_targets
docs: Σ per-validator directed targets, CHECKED-summed in PLAN-DIRECTED (list records AND
admission extras) — one leg of the PLAN-FINALIZE conservation proof.

fields.name: neutral_granted_total
docs: Σ neutral grants applied, CHECKED-summed grant-by-grant in PLAN-NEUTRAL — the second
leg of the conservation proof (independent of the round mirror's own accounting).

fields.name: rebalance_cursor
docs: Deterministic rebalance visit counter over `[0, 2 × planned validators)`: pass 0
(Draining decreases/removals) then pass 1 (ordinary deficit/surplus moves), each pass
walking list ordinals from the epoch-rotating start index. See `logic::rebalance_slot`.

fields.name: preferred_withdraw_surplus
docs: Greatest positive `observed active − final target` seen in the latest full plan walk
(reset at each capacity-round start; PLAN-DIRECTED seeds it for the zero-round case).

fields.name: preferred_withdraw_vote
docs: The vote account holding that greatest surplus (`[0; 32]` when none). PLAN-FINALIZE
sets it (or None) as the pool's preferred WITHDRAW validator — the deterministic
drain-first source.

fields.name: phase
docs: Current phase (`PHASE_*`).

fields.name: _padding
docs: Explicit padding to the 8-byte boundary (zero-copy layouts carry no implicit padding).

fields.name: _reserved
docs: Forward-compat reserve (carve from the HEAD on any later addition).

types.name: InitializeControllerArgs
docs: The predeclared stake-pool-side addresses (spec §"initialization without a persistent
bootstrap key": every account is created at a predetermined address, then verified).

fields.name: stake_pool
docs: The pre-created (program-owned, uninitialized) `StakePool` account.

fields.name: validator_list
docs: The pre-created `ValidatorList` account (sized to exactly `MAX_VALIDATORS`).

fields.name: reserve_stake
docs: The pool reserve stake account.

fields.name: fusol_mint
docs: The fuSOL mint.

fields.name: maintenance_vault
docs: The maintenance vault (fuSOL token account, authority = the `[b"maintenance"]` PDA);
doubles as the stake pool's manager fee account.

types.name: MaintenanceRewardPaid
docs: A bounded crank reward left the maintenance vault (fuSOL base units).

fields.name: crank
docs: The recipient fuSOL token account.

fields.name: task
docs: The task-class tag (`TASK_*` above — the instruction class that earned it).

types.name: NegativeNavObserved
docs: Pool finalization observed a LOWER exchange rate than the previous snapshot. Committed
immediately (never smoothed) so Fusion's collateral oracle recognizes the loss at once.

types.name: PlanFinalized
docs: PLAN-FINALIZE committed the epoch's final targets (conservation:
`Σ final targets + capacity_shortfall == productive_lamports`).

fields.name: capacity_shortfall
docs: Neutral lamports NO Active capacity could absorb (temporarily reserve-held).

types.name: PoolDeposit
docs: A deposit flowed through the controller's deposit authority (`op` = `DEPOSIT_KIND_*`).

fields.name: vote_account
docs: The deposited stake account's voter for stake deposits; `Pubkey::default()` for SOL.

fields.name: lamports
docs: Lamports entering pool accounting (SOL amount, or the full absorbed stake account).

types.name: PoolInitialized
docs: One-time: `initialize_pool` CPI'd the stake-pool `Initialize` and sealed the controller.

types.name: Preference
docs: One position's validator direction. PDA `[b"preference", fusion_position]` — the seed
includes the position address, so duplicate preference accounts cannot exist.
The `(observed_ink_nonce, observed_ink, owner)` triple is the anti-reuse belt-and-braces:
any collateral change bumps the position's ink nonce, desynchronizing this record until a
resync — which only becomes eligible NEXT epoch — so the same fungible shares can never
direct stake twice in one epoch through different positions. Losing countability affects
direction only; funds, solvency operations and fuSOL rewards never depend on this account.

fields.name: version
docs: Layout version byte (1).

fields.name: fusion_position
docs: The fusd-core `Position` this preference belongs to (also a PDA seed).

fields.name: owner
docs: Position owner at the last (re)sync.

fields.name: vote_account
docs: The selected validator's vote account.

fields.name: observed_ink_nonce
docs: `Position.ink_nonce` observed at the last (re)sync.

fields.name: observed_ink
docs: `Position.ink` observed at the last (re)sync (informational; the snapshot re-reads the
live ink).

fields.name: eligible_from_epoch
docs: First epoch this preference may count (sync-epoch + 1 on every nonce/validator change).

fields.name: last_counted_epoch
docs: Last epoch this preference was counted (one count per epoch).

fields.name: change_epoch
docs: Last epoch the OWNER changed the selected validator (at most one change per epoch).

fields.name: _reserved
docs: Forward-compat reserve (carve from the HEAD).

types.name: PreferenceUpdated
docs: A Preference lifecycle op (`op` = `PREF_OP_*`): set / synced / counted / closed.

fields.name: observed_ink
docs: Position ink observed (the directed weight a COUNTED snapshot added).

types.name: RebalanceActionExecuted
docs: One deterministic rebalance action executed (`action` = the `spl_cpi` discriminant of the
CPI performed: add / remove / increase / decrease-with-reserve / set-preferred-withdraw).

types.name: ValidatorRecord
docs: Per-validator controller state. PDA `[b"validator", vote_account]`, created permissionlessly
by `register_validator` (registration is NOT admission — admission to the stake-pool list is
an explicit plan outcome requiring eligibility + minimum directed support + list capacity).
Balance fields (`last_active_lamports` / `last_transient_lamports`) are OBSERVATIONS of the
canonical validator-list entry recorded at reconcile time — the controller never maintains a
competing balance; the stake-pool list stays the source of truth.

fields.name: version
docs: Layout version byte (1).

fields.name: vote_account
docs: The validator's vote account (also a PDA seed).

fields.name: validator_list_index
docs: Index of this validator's entry in the stake-pool `ValidatorList`;
`VALIDATOR_LIST_INDEX_UNSET` (u32::MAX) until admitted.

fields.name: status
docs: Lifecycle status (`fusion_stake_math::lifecycle::ValidatorStatus` byte; parse with
`ValidatorStatus::from_u8`, which fails closed on corruption).

fields.name: consecutive_liveness_failures
docs: Consecutive failed completed epochs of liveness BEFORE the current plan pass
(`LifecycleInput::consecutive_failures`).

fields.name: consecutive_healthy_epochs
docs: Consecutive healthy-with-pool-stake completed epochs (`LifecycleInput::consecutive_healthy`
— the Candidate promotion streak).

fields.name: has_pool_stake
docs: Validator carried pool stake through the last completed epoch.

fields.name: last_active_lamports
docs: Last observed canonical active stake (validator-list entry, at reconcile).

fields.name: last_transient_lamports
docs: Last observed canonical transient stake.

fields.name: directed_shares_epoch
docs: Epoch stamp for `directed_shares`: shares are valid only when this equals the epoch
being planned (a stale stamp reads as zero directed weight — no clearing pass needed).

fields.name: directed_shares
docs: Eligible directed fuSOL shares counted for `directed_shares_epoch` (checked-summed
into `EpochState.total_directed_shares` during PLAN-DIRECTED).

fields.name: directed_target
docs: This epoch's directed target floor (`min(floor(P·d/S), lifecycle_cap)`).

fields.name: neutral_granted
docs: Neutral lamports granted by capacity rounds this epoch.

fields.name: final_target
docs: `directed_target + neutral_granted` once PLAN-FINALIZE commits.

fields.name: remaining_capacity
docs: Remaining neutral capacity (`lifecycle_cap - current target`), decremented as rounds
grant — derived from the SAME snapshot the grants accumulate into.

fields.name: saturated_this_round
docs: The validator hit `remaining_capacity == 0` during round `saturated_round` (it leaves
the unsaturated set for subsequent rounds). Valid only when `saturated_round` equals
the current `EpochState.neutral_round_number` context.

fields.name: saturated_round
docs: The capacity round `saturated_this_round` refers to.

fields.name: last_increase_epoch
docs: Last epoch a rebalance INCREASE executed for this validator.

fields.name: last_decrease_epoch
docs: Last epoch a rebalance DECREASE executed for this validator.

fields.name: removal_delay_start
docs: Epoch this validator entered Draining (0 = never): the removal delay runs from here.

fields.name: observed_epoch
docs: Epoch stamp of the observations below (RECONCILE writes them; PLAN-DIRECTED requires
the stamp to be current before advancing the lifecycle from them).

fields.name: observed_commission_ok
docs: Inflation commission was at or below the fixed cap at reconcile. An UNREADABLE vote
account observes `true` here (and `false` for liveness): a systemic vote-state parse
failure must surface as guard-suppressible liveness failure, never as a mass
commission-drain that bypasses the global liveness guard.

fields.name: observed_liveness_ok
docs: Passed BOTH liveness checks at reconcile (fresh landed vote AND positive prior-epoch
credit growth). `false` freezes increases this epoch (single-failure rule).

fields.name: plan_epoch
docs: Epoch stamp of the last PLAN-DIRECTED result (once-per-epoch plan idempotency; also
certifies `validator_list_index` / targets / capacity as current-plan values).

fields.name: pool_entry_status
docs: Upstream `StakeStatus` byte of this validator's list entry at plan time
(`POOL_ENTRY_STATUS_NONE` when not in the pool). Gates preferred-withdraw candidacy.

fields.name: _reserved
docs: Forward-compat reserve (carve from the HEAD).

types.name: ValidatorRegistered
docs: A `ValidatorRecord` was created for a vote account (registration, NOT admission).

types.name: ValidatorStatusChanged
docs: A validator's lifecycle status changed (admission, promotion, draining, removal).

fields.name: old_status
docs: `fusion_stake_math::lifecycle::ValidatorStatus` bytes.
